summary: Good capsule: correctly identifies Redis OOM with noeviction as root cause and session-500s as consequences, memory warnings correctly labeled triggers; two slow-disk-write distractor lines are admitted as 'context' which is acceptable but slightly noisy.
improvements: The two slow-disk-write 'context' entries (lines 8 and 15) appear very early and pre-date the Redis pressure by over a minute; labeling them explicitly as 'distractor' or omitting them would prevent engineers from chasing the disk write path

The 'eviction policy noeviction' error (line 80) is labeled 'consequence' but it is effectively a second dimension of the root cause explaining why OOM was not self-healing; labeling it 'root_cause' alongside the OOM error would be more precise
